asymptotic-per-digit-ratio-optimization.summary: Optimize the per-digit limit (d→∞, cap density c) via the log-spectral-radius of the cap-constrained transfer matrix; maximize R-(c)-R+(c) per log(B) toward the 1.25 ceiling, then instantiate a concrete finite U.

beyond-digit-set-structured-U.summary: Scout non-digit-set structured U (GAPs/Bohr-like, convex-body projections, Sidon/B_h) — the only family that can exceed the 1.25 digit-set ceiling; score 2-3 families' exact GHR bound, no promised beat.

digit-dp-count-engine-and-record-baselin.summary: Exact carry-free cap-coupled DP count engine for |U+U|,|U-U|,max(U); reproduce the record 1.174074447 (search-immune baseline, gap 0, machinery — analogous to 9a-367).

directed-param-sweep-exact-beat.summary: Bounded exact-integer sweep over (alphabet A, base B, length d, cap T) around the hand-tuned record for a strict beat of 1.1740744 by a clean integer margin (Fraction + rational-power compare, never float).

lean-cert-rational-power.summary: Machine-checked GHR bound: rationalize 1+log(N-/N+)/log(2M+1)≥c to the pure integer inequality N-^q ≥ N+^q·(2M+1)^p and prove it in Lean (decide/norm_num) + GHR-lemma bridge as a named trust boundary.
